TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == limasa ku sapikayakay tu Taypak 101 : kasenun han patahekal miadih == kaudipan nu hekal ŤÉĆśôĮ Taypak 101 " tu sept u lim mihcaan" ŚŹįŚĆó101(2025ŚĻī) Taypak 101 talakaw 508 kun-ce, naw 2004 mihcaan katukuh 2009 mihcaan u satalakaway nu kanatal a nisangaan tu luma'. katukuh tu 2026 mihcaan, ina luma' itini i kitakidan itida tu sabaw cacay nu satalakaway nu matatungduhay nu luma'an. 2004 mihcaan, mikayakayay nu Fua-ku tademaw ci A-lan.Luo-pei-e nai tabakiay nu udadan mikayakay makaala tu sepatay nu tukian mikayakay tini Taypak 101, micukaymas tu sakay ancin nu laican, caay kaw limasa ku sapikayakay nida. ci Luo-pei-e makaala tu ku nipikayakayan nida tu luma' makaala tu tusa a lasubu, mikayakay tina utiihay nu enem a tisuan mikayakay tina 101. saan ku Tung-se-cen ci Cia-yun-cie, nina kawaw tu nikaalaan tu tigami ni Lei-nuo-de sa, nipidaduyan sisa hang satu. ina pulung nu nikasasakamuan, u mikawaway tina kawawan a tademaw ci Cen-mu-se. Se-mi-se "James Smith" saan mikiyaku tina kawawan i cacayay tu a mihcaan a malingatu a mikiyaku sa tayni i Taywan milikeluh ci Cia-yun-cie an. saan ci Se-mi-se, tu nikasasakamuan aci Cia-yun-cie matineng tu nikapulung nu balucu' sa pacekel tina kawawan. namiadih tu ci Cia-yun-cie tunipikayakay ni Huo-nuo-de anikilukan tu " lima ku sapikayakay", tunipikayakayan atu icelang nida palutatengan, sisa hang mihedek tina kawawan. . saan ci Lei-nuo-de amidateng, yu asikawaw tina kawawan, namikayakay tu cinida tu kina cacay, u caayay kalecad nu demiadan a minanam. ku cacay a tatukian tu 25 widian katuku tu tusa a tatukian sabaw lima widian, tatengn caay kalucek ku kina tatukian, nipikayakayan mahicaay kiya utiutii'han. . hang sa tinakawawan sa miala ci nida tu pasingbungay nu Niw-ye a tademaw ci Adam Skolnick saan sa, nipikayakayan tina kawawan u kalisiw " tadaadidi' tu sakalaluman sa", ina kalisiwhan " u enemay nu Amilika nu teban a kalisiwan". Adam Skolnick ". sapatahekal miadih śí≠Śáļ ina kamuk ku itida i 2026 mihcaan 1 bulad 24 demiad patahekal, la'cus nu demiad sisa patadikuden naca a patahekal. saan ci Cia-yun-cie, pikawawan a demiad anu la'cu sa patadikuden hakiya pikulian nu tademaw a patahekal, patelayen ku Taypak se-cen-hu atu mikuwanay tu ciaw-tun Pucen ci Cen-se-kay, hang sa pacukel tu amipadang. . culil misiwbay Ť°Ćťä∑ sapatahekal tina kamukan, ci Cia-yun-cie itida i 2026 mihcaan 1 bulad 14 demiad mikayakay katukuh i Taypak 101 nu tungduhan, itini i sapasingbungan patahekal nu udip makaala tu 101 nu tudutan a makimulmulay nu sasingan. . kalawlawan Áą≠Ť≠į yumikayakay ci Lei-nu-de tu Taypak 101, itida i labu nu luma'an idaw ku mikuliay, duma, idaw ku cacayay a nipisasingan mueneng tu i sasingalan masasing nu misasingay a tademaw patahekalen i wanglu a paadih tu katuuday, katuud ku pabaliway a tademaw, saan, hatida tu ku capi a misasing hakiya a mabiyalaw ku mikayakayay nu tademaw, idaw ku sananay tina kawawan tu sakacaay kalecad nu sasakamuan. . hamin satu kinakawaw, katuud ku malekalay nu balucu sakay tida i 101 a niyadu'an tu sapitudung ci Lei-nu-de an a mikayakay. setupan ku mahiniay a kawaw. . saan ku nii'ay nu cudadan ci Li-cen tu ci Lei-nu-de tu nipikayakayan a misasingay a tademaw ci Cin-kuo-wi, patahekalen nida ku nisasingan nida, tahekal ku kamu caay kaw tatengaay sa inataw ci Cin-kuo-wi tawya itida ci nida i Nan-ci, tatengan ina sassing u AI ku misangaay. duma nu misingbungay patelac ku mahiniay a kamuan sa. .
S.PHON: == r~…ĺimasa ku sapikajakaj tu tajpak *** : kas…ônun ńßan patańß…ôkar~…ĺ miadińß == kaudipan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ** tajpak *** " tu s…ôpt u r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan" *****(*****) tajpak *** tar~…ĺakaw *** kun- ¶…ô, naw **** mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** mińß ¶aan u satar~…ĺakawaj nu kanatar~…ĺ a nisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. katukuńß tu **** mińß ¶aan, ina r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° itini i kitakidan itida tu sabaw ¶a ¶aj nu satar~…ĺakawaj nu matatuŇčduńßaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. **** mińß ¶aan, mikajakajaj nu fua-ku tad…ômaw ¶i a-r~…ĺan.r~…ĺuo-p…ôi-…ô nai tabakiaj nu udadan mikajakaj makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpataj nu tukian mikajakaj tini tajpak ***, mi ¶ukajmas tu sakaj an ¶in nu r~…ĺai ¶an, ¶aaj kaw r~…ĺimasa ku sapikajakaj nida. ¶i r~…ĺuo-p…ôi-…ô makaar~…ĺa tu ku nipikajakajan nida tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a r~…ĺasubu, mikajakaj tina utiińßaj nu …ôn…ôm a tisuan mikajakaj tina ***. saan ku tuŇč-s…ô- ¶…ôn ¶i ¶ia-jun- ¶i…ô, nina kawaw tu nikaar~…ĺaan tu tigami ni r~…ĺ…ôi-nuo-d…ô sa, nipidadujan sisa ńßaŇč satu. ina pur~…ĺuŇč nu nikasasakamuan, u mikawawaj tina kawawan a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶…ôn-mu-s…ô. s…ô-mi-s…ô "*am…ôs smitńß" saan mikijaku tina kawawan i ¶a ¶ajaj tu a mińß ¶aan a mar~…ĺiŇčatu a mikijaku sa tajni i tajwan mir~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß ¶i ¶ia-jun- ¶i…ô an. saan ¶i s…ô-mi-s…ô, tu nikasasakamuan a ¶i ¶ia-jun- ¶i…ô matin…ôŇč tu nikapur~…ĺuŇč nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° sa pa ¶…ôk…ôr~…ĺ tina kawawan. namiadińß tu ¶i ¶ia-jun- ¶i…ô tunipikajakaj ni ńßuo-nuo-d…ô anikir~…ĺukan tu " r~…ĺima ku sapikajakaj", tunipikajakajan atu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nida par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan, sisa ńßaŇč mińß…ôd…ôk tina kawawan. . saan ¶i r~…ĺ…ôi-nuo-d…ô amidat…ôŇč, ju asikawaw tina kawawan, namikajakaj tu ¶inida tu kina ¶a ¶aj, u ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu d…ômiadan a minanam. ku ¶a ¶aj a tatukian tu ** widian katuku tu tusa a tatukian sabaw r~…ĺima widian, tat…ôŇčn ¶aaj kar~…ĺu ¶…ôk ku kina tatukian, nipikajakajan mańßi ¶aaj kija utiutii Ē~ °ńßan. . ńßaŇč sa tinakawawan sa miar~…ĺa ¶i nida tu pasiŇčbuŇčaj nu niw-j…ô a tad…ômaw ¶i adam skor~…ĺni ¶k saan sa, nipikajakajan tina kawawan u kar~…ĺisiw " tadaadidi Ē~ ° tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺuman sa", ina kar~…ĺisiwńßan " u …ôn…ômaj nu amir~…ĺika nu t…ôban a kar~…ĺisiwan". adam skor~…ĺni ¶k ". sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ miadińß ** ina kamuk ku itida i **** mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad patańß…ôkar~…ĺ, r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us nu d…ômiad sisa patadikud…ôn na ¶a a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ. saan ¶i ¶ia-jun- ¶i…ô, pikawawan a d…ômiad anu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶u sa patadikud…ôn ńßakija pikur~…ĺian nu tad…ômaw a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ, pat…ôr~…ĺaj…ôn ku tajpak s…ô- ¶…ôn-ńßu atu mikuwanaj tu ¶iaw-tun pu ¶…ôn ¶i ¶…ôn-s…ô-kaj, ńßaŇč sa pa ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ tu amipadaŇč. . ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ misiwbaj ** sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tina kamukan, ¶i ¶ia-jun- ¶i…ô itida i **** mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad mikajakaj katukuńß i tajpak *** nu tuŇčduńßan, itini i sapasiŇčbuŇčan patańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu udip makaar~…ĺa tu *** nu tudutan a makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj nu sasiŇčan. . kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan ** jumikajakaj ¶i r~…ĺ…ôi-nu-d…ô tu tajpak ***, itida i r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an idaw ku mikur~…ĺiaj, duma, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a nipisasiŇčan mu…ôn…ôŇč tu i sasiŇčar~…ĺan masasiŇč nu misasiŇčaj a tad…ômaw patańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn i waŇčr~…ĺu a paadińß tu katuudaj, katuud ku pabar~…ĺiwaj a tad…ômaw, saan, ńßatida tu ku ¶api a misasiŇč ńßakija a mabijar~…ĺaw ku mikajakajaj nu tad…ômaw, idaw ku sananaj tina kawawan tu saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu sasakamuan. . ńßamin satu kinakawaw, katuud ku mar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u sakaj tida i *** a nijadu Ē~ °an tu sapituduŇč ¶i r~…ĺ…ôi-nu-d…ô an a mikajakaj. s…ôtupan ku mańßiniaj a kawaw. . saan ku nii Ē~ °aj nu ¶udadan ¶i r~…ĺi- ¶…ôn tu ¶i r~…ĺ…ôi-nu-d…ô tu nipikajakajan a misasiŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶in-kuo-wi, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn nida ku nisasiŇčan nida, tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku kamu ¶aaj kaw tat…ôŇčaaj sa inataw ¶i ¶in-kuo-wi tawja itida ¶i nida i nan- ¶i, tat…ôŇčan ina sassiŇč u ai ku misaŇčaaj. duma nu misiŇčbuŇčaj pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku mańßiniaj a kamuan sa. .
S.FORM: == limasa ku sapikayakay tu Taypak 101 : kasenun han patahekal miadih == kaudipan nu hekal ŤÉĆśôĮ Taypak 101 " tu sept u lim mihcaan" ŚŹįŚĆó101(2025ŚĻī) Taypak 101 talakaw 508 kun-ce, naw 2004 mihcaan katukuh 2009 mihcaan u satalakaway nu kanatal a nisangaan tu luma'. katukuh tu 2026 mihcaan, ina luma' itini i kitakidan itida tu sabaw cacay nu satalakaway nu matatungduhay nu luma'an. 2004 mihcaan, mikayakayay nu Fua-ku tademaw ci A-lan.Luo-pei-e nai tabakiay nu udadan mikayakay makaala tu sepatay nu tukian mikayakay tini Taypak 101, micukaymas tu sakay ancin nu laican, caay kaw limasa ku sapikayakay nida. ci Luo-pei-e makaala tu ku nipikayakayan nida tu luma' makaala tu tusa a lasubu, mikayakay tina utiihay nu enem a tisuan mikayakay tina 101. saan ku Tung-se-cen ci Cia-yun-cie, nina kawaw tu nikaalaan tu tigami ni Lei-nuo-de sa, nipidaduyan sisa hang satu. ina pulung nu nikasasakamuan, u mikawaway tina kawawan a tademaw ci Cen-mu-se. Se-mi-se "James Smith" saan mikiyaku tina kawawan i cacayay tu a mihcaan a malingatu a mikiyaku sa tayni i Taywan milikeluh ci Cia-yun-cie an. saan ci Se-mi-se, tu nikasasakamuan aci Cia-yun-cie matineng tu nikapulung nu balucu' sa pacekel tina kawawan. namiadih tu ci Cia-yun-cie tunipikayakay ni Huo-nuo-de anikilukan tu " lima ku sapikayakay", tunipikayakayan atu icelang nida palutatengan, sisa hang mihedek tina kawawan. . saan ci Lei-nuo-de amidateng, yu asikawaw tina kawawan, namikayakay tu cinida tu kina cacay, u caayay kalecad nu demiadan a minanam. ku cacay a tatukian tu 25 widian katuku tu tusa a tatukian sabaw lima widian, tatengn caay kalucek ku kina tatukian, nipikayakayan mahicaay kiya utiutii'han. . hang sa tinakawawan sa miala ci nida tu pasingbungay nu Niw-ye a tademaw ci Adam Skolnick saan sa, nipikayakayan tina kawawan u kalisiw " tadaadidi' tu sakalaluman sa", ina kalisiwhan " u enemay nu Amilika nu teban a kalisiwan". Adam Skolnick ". sapatahekal miadih śí≠Śáļ ina kamuk ku itida i 2026 mihcaan 1 bulad 24 demiad patahekal, la'cus nu demiad sisa patadikuden naca a patahekal. saan ci Cia-yun-cie, pikawawan a demiad anu la'cu sa patadikuden hakiya pikulian nu tademaw a patahekal, patelayen ku Taypak se-cen-hu atu mikuwanay tu ciaw-tun Pucen ci Cen-se-kay, hang sa pacukel tu amipadang. . culil misiwbay Ť°Ćťä∑ sapatahekal tina kamukan, ci Cia-yun-cie itida i 2026 mihcaan 1 bulad 14 demiad mikayakay katukuh i Taypak 101 nu tungduhan, itini i sapasingbungan patahekal nu udip makaala tu 101 nu tudutan a makimulmulay nu sasingan. . kalawlawan Áą≠Ť≠į yumikayakay ci Lei-nu-de tu Taypak 101, itida i labu nu luma'an idaw ku mikuliay, duma, idaw ku cacayay a nipisasingan mueneng tu i sasingalan masasing nu misasingay a tademaw patahekalen i wanglu a paadih tu katuuday, katuud ku pabaliway a tademaw, saan, hatida tu ku capi a misasing hakiya a mabiyalaw ku mikayakayay nu tademaw, idaw ku sananay tina kawawan tu sakacaay kalecad nu sasakamuan. . hamin satu kinakawaw, katuud ku malekalay nu balucu sakay tida i 101 a niyadu'an tu sapitudung ci Lei-nu-de an a mikayakay. setupan ku mahiniay a kawaw. . saan ku nii'ay nu cudadan ci Li-cen tu ci Lei-nu-de tu nipikayakayan a misasingay a tademaw ci Cin-kuo-wi, patahekalen nida ku nisasingan nida, tahekal ku kamu caay kaw tatengaay sa inataw ci Cin-kuo-wi tawya itida ci nida i Nan-ci, tatengan ina sassing u AI ku misangaay. duma nu misingbungay patelac ku mahiniay a kamuan sa. .

kun- ¶…ô, naw **** mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** mińß ¶aan u satar~…ĺakawaj nu kanatar~…ĺ a nisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. katukuńß tu **** mińß ¶aan, ina r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° itini i kitakidan itida tu sabaw ¶a ¶aj nu r~…ĺi- ¶…ôn tu ¶i r~…ĺ…ôi-nu-d…ô tu nipikajakajan a misasiŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶in-kuo-wi, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn nida ku nisasiŇčan nida, tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku kamu ¶aaj kaw tat…ôŇčaaj sa inataw ¶i ¶in-kuo-wi tawja itida ¶i nida i nan- ¶i, tat…ôŇčan ina sassiŇč u ai ku misaŇčaaj. duma nu misiŇčbuŇčaj pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku mańßiniaj a kamuan sa. .
